title: Byron K. Lichtenberg
body: Byron Kurt Lichtenberg (born February 19, 1948) is an American engineer and fighter pilot who flew aboard two NASA Space Shuttle missions as a Payload Specialist. In 1983, he and Ulf Merbold became the first Payload Specialists to fly on the shuttle.
categories: Brown University School of Engineering alumni
Recipients of the Distinguished Flying Cross (United States)
